en: Praise the LORD! Blessed is the man who fears the LORD, who greatly delights in his commandments!
zh: 你們要讚美耶和華。 敬畏耶和華、熱愛他的誡命的， 這人是有福的。

en: His offspring will be mighty in the land; the generation of the upright will be blessed.
zh: 他的後裔在地上必強盛， 正直人的後代必蒙福。

en: Wealth and riches are in his house, and his righteousness endures forever.
zh: 他家中有財富，有金錢， 他的仁義存到永遠。

en: Light dawns in the darkness for the upright; he is gracious, merciful, and righteous.
zh: 正直人在黑暗中有光照亮他， 他滿有恩慈，好憐恤，行公義。

en: It is well with the man who deals generously and lends; who conducts his affairs with justice.
zh: 恩待人，借貸給別人，按公正處理自己事務的， 這人必享福樂。

en: For the righteous will never be moved; he will be remembered forever.
zh: 因為他永遠不會動搖， 義人必永遠被記念。

en: He is not afraid of bad news; his heart is firm, trusting in the LORD.
zh: 他必不因壞消息懼怕； 他的心堅定，倚靠耶和華。

en: His heart is steady; he will not be afraid, until he looks in triumph on his adversaries.
zh: 他的心堅決，毫不懼怕， 直到他看見他的敵人遭報。

en: He has distributed freely; he has given to the poor; his righteousness endures forever; his horn is exalted in honor.
zh: 他廣施錢財，賙濟窮人； 他的仁義存到永遠； 他的角必被高舉，大有榮耀。

en: The wicked man sees it and is angry; he gnashes his teeth and melts away; the desire of the wicked will perish!
zh: 惡人看見就惱怒， 他必咬牙切齒，身心耗損； 惡人的心願必幻滅。
